name: Paella
recipeIngredient: 1 Chicken broiler, cut up       6    Strands saffron
1/4 cup Oil                     1    Green bell pepper, diced
1 lb Raw shrimp                  1    Red bell pepper, diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown chicken and garlic in oil; remove to a large casserole dish.
2. Add shrimp, tomatoes, peas, and artichoke hearts to the dish.
3. In the oil used to brown the chicken, sauté rice, saffron, onion, green and red bell peppers for 7 minutes.
4. Add the sautéed mixture to the casserole dish; sprinkle with paprika.
5. Pour in white wine and water.
6. Bake uncovered at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour, or until the rice is cooked.
